requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Qatar BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619作为卡塔尔BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619作為卡達BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: Qatar does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to Saudi Arabia's SABER/IEC 62619 route, the EU Battery Regulation, or similar mandatory certification regimes. QGOSM's published regulated-product list (as last publicly verified in 2014) did not explicitly include stationary BESS cells or systems, and no updated QGOSM Technical Regulation specifically for BESS has been confirmed from official sources. However, IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules, and Qatar project owners, EPCs, and Kahramaa connection agreements for utility-scale and C&I storage projects are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite. Exporters should verify the current QGOSM regulated-product list directly with QGOSM before shipment.
summary.zh: 卡塔尔目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路径、欧盟《电池法规》或类似强制认证制度相当。QGOSM已公布的受监管产品清单（截至最近一次公开核实的2014年）未明确列入固定式BESS电芯或系统，且未从官方来源确认任何专门针对BESS的QGOSM技术法规更新。然而，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，卡塔尔项目业主、EPC承包商及Kahramaa公用事业规模和工商业储能项目的并网协议，预计将以IEC 62619合规作为技术前提。出口商在出货前应直接向QGOSM核实现行受监管产品清单。
summary.zht: 卡達目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路徑、歐盟《電池法規》或類似強制認證制度相當。QGOSM已公布的受監管產品清單（截至最近一次公開核實的2014年）未明確列入固定式BESS電芯或系統，且未從官方來源確認任何專門針對BESS的QGOSM技術法規更新。然而，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，卡達項目業主、EPC承包商及Kahramaa公用事業規模和工商業儲能項目的併網協議，預計將以IEC 62619合規作為技術前提。出口商在出貨前應直接向QGOSM核實現行受監管產品清單。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Qatar project specifications)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard referenced in project specifications)
QGOSM — Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology (verify current regulated product list directly; no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific Technical Regulation as of dataset date)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in Qatar project specifications. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被卡塔尔项目规格接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被卡達項目規格接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Qatar project owners and Kahramaa connection agreements reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications. Exporters should: (a) verify the current QGOSM regulated-product list for any mandatory pre-shipment CoC obligation; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Qatar BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification or Kahramaa connection agreement before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 关键差距：卡塔尔项目业主和Kahramaa并网协议将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）核实现行QGOSM受监管产品清单，确认是否存在强制装运前CoC义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至卡塔尔BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格或Kahramaa并网协议中引用的IEC 62619版本。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：卡達項目業主和Kahramaa併網協議將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）核實現行QGOSM受監管產品清單，確認是否存在強制裝運前CoC義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至卡達BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格或Kahramaa併網協議中引用的IEC 62619版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where Kahramaa or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; QGOSM mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS has not been confirmed — verify directly with QGOSM
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Qatar as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Qatar project specifications and Kahramaa connection agreements. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Qatar project acceptance. Verify QGOSM current regulated-product scope and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, Kahramaa, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，卡塔尔尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是卡塔尔项目规格和Kahramaa并网协议中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足卡塔尔项目验收要求。出货前请核实QGOSM现行受监管产品范围，并向项目业主、Kahramaa及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，卡達尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是卡達項目規格和Kahramaa併網協議中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足卡達項目驗收要求。出貨前請核實QGOSM現行受監管產品範圍，並向項目業主、Kahramaa及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619證據要求。
